prerequisites.value: Chaotic neutral, lawful neutral, or neutral alignment.

description.value: **Benefit:** When casting a summon monster spell, you gain access to the list of neutral creatures at right. You may also summon creatures from the standard summon monster list and apply the counterpoised creature simple template to applicable creatures instead of the celestial or fiendish template. Creatures you summon from the list and creatures you summon with the counterpoised template gain a +2 resistance bonus on Will saves.
